FfiFailed(string).notice: Error for when an ffi command fails.

documentation.text: @notice Error for when an ffi command fails.

@notice Run a command in a subprocess. Fails if no output is returned.
 @param _command Command to run.

typeDescriptions.typeString: function (string memory[] memory) external returns (struct VmSafe.FfiResult memory)
